description: System Control Features - Start/stop controls, risk parameter adjustments, and manual override functionality for admin users

userStories.title: Create SystemControlPanel component
userStories.description: As an admin, I need controls to start and stop the trading system.
acceptanceCriteria: Add RoleGuard to restrict to admin role
Add loading state during API call
Verify in browser that controls work
userStories.notes: Implemented SystemControlPanel with all acceptance criteria met. Created RoleGuard component and useSession hook for auth integration.

userStories.title: Create RiskParameterControls component
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to adjust risk parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: Add slider for max position size (0.01-1.0 lots)
Add slider for max daily loss limit ($100-$10000)
Add slider for max concurrent trades (1-10)
Add slider for risk per trade (1%-10%)
Show validation warnings for extreme values
Add RoleGuard to restrict to admin role
Use shadcn/ui Slider, Switch, Button components
Verify in browser that controls work

userStories.title: Create ManualOverride component
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to manually override system controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Pause Evolution' button when override enabled
Add 'Force Trade Approval' button when override enabled
Show confirmation dialogs for dangerous actions
Add warning banner when override is enabled
Add RoleGuard to restrict to admin role
Use shadcn/ui Switch, Button, Alert components
Verify in browser that override works
